chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6709 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.20268/2025 2. For orders on CMA No.20210/2025 3. For orders as to maintainability of petition in light of order dated 26.08.2025 30.10.2025 Mr. Khursheed Javed, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zahrah Sahar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Shaukat Hayat, advocate for respondent No.5 alongwith Mr. Azhar Ali Golo, advocate Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall seek orders upon its application made before respondent Nos.2 and 3, as available at page 153 of the court file, and does not press this petition. In view hereof, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
